name: Oatmeal Ice-Box Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar, rolled oats, and sifted all-purpose flour in a large bowl.
2. Cut in the butter and lard until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in the sour milk or buttermilk.
4. Stir the dissolved baking soda into the dry ingredients until well combined to form a dough.
5. Form the dough into a large roll and chill in the refrigerator for at least overnight.
6. Once chilled, slice the roll very thin using a sharp knife (for crisp cookies).
7. Place the cookie slices on greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 375°F until golden brown.
